items.title_zh: DeepSeek 500亿融资敲定！估值3380亿
items.title_en: DeepSeek Secures 50 Billion Yuan in Funding, Valuation Reaches 338 Billion
items.summary_zh: DeepSeek 500亿融资敲定！估值3380亿 东方财富
items.summary_en: DeepSeek has completed its first funding round of over 50 billion yuan, with a valuation of 338 billion yuan. Founder Liang Wenfeng personally invested 20 billion yuan, followed by Tencent (10 billion), CATL (5 billion), and others. This makes DeepSeek the highest-valued AI startup in China.
items.why_zh: DeepSeek以500亿元融资成为国内估值最高的AI初创企业，凸显了市场对国产大模型的高度信心。
items.why_en: DeepSeek's record funding round underscores strong market confidence in Chinese AI models.

items.title_zh: 优矩控股：一季度在线营销解决方案账单金额41亿元，同比增长24%
items.title_en: Youju Holdings Q1 Online Marketing Billings Reach 4.1 Billion Yuan, Up 24% YoY
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，优矩控股发布2026年第一季度未经审核营运数据。数据显示，公司在线上营销解决方案业务领域账单规模41亿元，较去年同期增长24%，期内同比新增合作客户378家。同时，一季度新增精品短剧超100部，新增下载量超20万，未来将发展AI真人剧及本土独家剧。
items.summary_en: Youju Holdings reported Q1 2026 online marketing billings of 4.1 billion yuan, up 24% year-over-year, with 378 new clients. The company also added over 100 short dramas and plans to focus on AI-generated live-action dramas.
items.why_zh: 优矩控股的业绩增长和AI短剧布局，反映了AI技术在内容营销领域的加速渗透。
items.why_en: Youju's growth and AI drama strategy highlight AI's increasing role in content marketing.

items.title_zh: Beyond Identity推出Ceros AI代理安全平台
items.title_en: Beyond Identity launches Ceros AI agent security platform
items.summary_zh: Beyond Identity发布了名为Ceros的AI代理安全平台，旨在为AI代理和工作流提供统一身份、可观测性和治理能力。该平台可确保每个AI代理的身份安全，监控其行为，并实施治理策略，帮助企业防范AI代理带来的安全风险。
items.summary_en: Beyond Identity launches Ceros AI agent security platform SiliconANGLE
items.why_zh: 随着AI代理的普及，Ceros平台填补了代理身份安全与治理的关键空白。
items.why_en: As AI agents proliferate, Ceros addresses the critical need for agent identity security and governance.

items.title_zh: Ceros发布：为每个AI代理和工作流提供统一身份、可观测性和治理
items.title_en: Ceros Launches Providing Unified Identity, Observability and Governance for Every AI Agent and Workflow
items.summary_zh: Ceros平台正式发布，旨在为每个AI代理和工作流提供统一身份管理、可观测性和治理能力。该平台能够监控AI代理的行为，确保其符合安全策略，并提供全面的可见性，帮助企业安全地部署和管理AI代理。
items.summary_en: Ceros Launches Providing Unified Identity, Observability and Governance for Every AI Agent and Workflow PR Newswire
items.why_zh: Ceros为AI代理的规模化部署提供了必要的安全和管理基础设施。
items.why_en: Ceros provides essential security and management infrastructure for scaling AI agent deployments.

items.summary_en: Chinese AI company DeepSeek has completed its first external financing round of over 50 billion yuan (about $7 billion), setting a record for the largest single round in China's AI industry. Investors include Tencent, JD.com, CATL, and NetEase, with founder Liang Wenfeng personally contributing about 20 billion yuan. The funding values DeepSeek at over 94 billion Singapore dollars.
items.why_zh: 这是中国AI行业最大单轮融资，标志着资本对本土AI技术的高度认可，将加速DeepSeek在基础模型和商业化方面的突破。
items.why_en: This is the largest single financing round in China's AI industry, signaling strong capital confidence in domestic AI technology and accelerating DeepSeek's breakthroughs in foundation models and commercialization.

items.why_en: The financing scale highlights the strong capital attraction of China's AI sector, enabling DeepSeek to accelerate its catch-up with global leaders.

items.title_zh: 融了数亿美金的「大晓机器人」，其创始人揭开了具身行业的割裂一面
items.title_en: Da Xiao Robotics Founder Reveals Fragmentation in Embodied AI, Unveils World Model and Funding
items.summary_zh: 文｜周鑫雨 编辑｜张雨忻 梳理近半年的成果，大晓机器人董事长、商汤科技联合创始人王晓刚，滔滔不绝聊了10多分钟。 成立于2025年7月，大晓机器人（ACE ROBOTICS）是具身领域姗姗来迟的入局者。但一年来，这位新玩家成了赛道的“卷王”： 在模型侧，大晓新发布的具身大脑——世界模型“开悟（Kairos）3.0”，在4项全球具身智能基准测试中取得SOTA；开源的Kairos 3.0-4B，则率先实现在端侧直接驱动具身智能本体的能力。 △Kairos3.0在4个世界模型生成预测具身智能榜单中取得SOTA。图源：大晓机器人 在数据侧，大晓提出的“以人为中心”环境式采集方案，通过大规模采集人类与真实环境的交互过程，将世界模型训练数据量扩展至100万小时，达到传统真机（人遥控机器人）采集模式的10倍。 还有落地——半年前，大晓的具身大脑模组A1，落地的主要场景，还是从事道路巡检的机器狗；如今，这颗“大脑”已经随着形态各异的机器人，进入了酒店、无人零售店、无人物流仓等多个场景。 △大晓在上海西岸落地的机器狗巡逻方案。图源：大晓机器人 2026年6月15日， 大晓机器人官宣完成天使+轮融资 ——距离上一轮官宣，仅隔了4个月。 这一轮投资方包括达晨财智、深创投、上海科创基金、沐曦股份、盛宇投资、复星锐正、华控基金、临港新片区基金、豫资涨泉等基金，老股东商汤国香资本持续增资，告捷资本担任长期财务…
items.summary_en: Da Xiao Robotics chairman Wang Xiaogang discussed the fragmentation in embodied AI. The company, founded in July 2025, released the world model 'Kairos 3.0' achieving SOTA on four benchmarks, and an open-source 4B model for edge deployment. It expanded training data to 1 million hours via human-centric collection. Applications now include hotels and retail stores. On June 15, 2026, it announced angel+ round financing, just four months after the previous round.
items.why_zh: 大晓机器人的快速迭代与融资节奏，反映了具身智能赛道的高竞争与资本热度，其世界模型与数据策略可能推动行业标准化。
items.why_en: Da Xiao's rapid iteration and financing pace reflect high competition and capital interest in embodied AI; its world model and data strategy may drive industry standardization.

items.summary_zh: 6月16日，据报道，软银创始人兼首席执行官孙正义在新闻发布会上表示，软银与OpenAI将为企业客户提供“补丁即服务（patching as a service）”。该服务将帮助企业评估安全漏洞，以保障关键基础设施的安全。孙正义表示：“利用先进AI发起的网络攻击将日益猖獗。我们决心利用最前沿的AI技术来抵御这些攻击。”（界面）

items.title_zh: 微软称保守假设下，典型 AI 查询耗水量少于 1 滴水
items.title_en: Microsoft: Typical AI Query Uses Less Than One Drop of Water
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，微软昨日（6 月 15 日）发布博文，援引《Joule》研究指出， AI 在大规模部署下的能耗与用水量显著低于外界早前估计。 该研究认为在大规模推理场景下，外界对 AI 大语言模型的关注点，不应该只放在单个模型的训练 / 推理规模，更应该注重用户典型调用下的“每次查询”。 该研究指出一次常规典型 AI 调用，耗电 0.16 至 0.60 瓦时（watt-hours），约等于一台 40 瓦电脑运行 15 至 60 秒，或 1000 瓦微波炉工作 0.6 至 2 秒。相比此前文献和媒体报道，新研究的数据低至 1/4 到 1/20。 水资源方面，保守估计下，典型查询的冷却用水为 0.0 至 0.067 毫升，中位数约相当于 1/100 茶匙，甚至少于 1 滴。微软还提到，随着零用水数据中心设计推广，这一数字还有继续下降的空间。IT之家附上相关截图如下： 微软指出规模越大，单位查询效率通常越高。大系统可同时处理更多请求，并在模型、调度、硬件多个层面叠加优化。就像大型航空公司更容易通过统一调度节省燃料，云平台也能把效率改进扩散到每一次推理。 在 10 亿次日查询场景下，基础耗电约 0.7 吉瓦时；若加入效率优化，可降至约 0.3 吉瓦时。即使 10% 请求属于代码生成、多步推理等长任务，整体能耗仍可比基线下降一半以上。
items.summary_en: Microsoft cites a Joule study showing AI query energy and water usage are much lower than previously estimated. A typical query uses 0.16-0.60 watt-hours and 0-0.067 ml of cooling water, less than a drop. Efficiency improves with scale.
items.why_zh: 该研究有助于纠正公众对AI环境影响的误解，表明AI的能耗和用水量可能被高估。
items.why_en: This study helps correct public misconceptions about AI's environmental impact, suggesting energy and water usage may be overestimated.

items.title_zh: AI 搜索引擎 Perplexity CEO 斯里尼瓦斯：黄仁勋、马斯克教我时刻保持危机意识与工作状态
items.title_en: Perplexity CEO Shares Lessons from Jensen Huang and Elon Musk: Stay Paranoid and Mission-Driven
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，据《商业内幕》16 日（今天）报道，Perplexity CEO 阿拉温德 · 斯里尼瓦斯分享了两条特别的创业经验，分别来自 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋和特斯拉 CEO 埃隆 · 马斯克 。他坦言，黄仁勋和马斯克都教给他重要一课，而且两条经验一直被他记在心里。 斯里尼瓦斯曾在谷歌 DeepMind 和 OpenAI 担任研究员，2022 年共同创办 AI 搜索引擎 Perplexity。此前有消息称，Perplexity 正在寻求新一轮融资，投后估值为 200 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 1354.38 亿元人民币）。Perplexity 的投资方包括软银、英伟达和杰夫 · 贝索斯。 斯里尼瓦斯表示，他从黄仁勋身上学到的，是创业者必须 始终保持危机感 。“想想看。5 万亿美元（现汇率约合 33.86 万亿元人民币）市值，未来两年几乎确定能实现 5000 亿美元（现汇率约合 3.39 万亿元人民币）营收。英伟达拥有世界上最先进的芯片。但黄仁勋经营公司时，却像英伟达 可能 30 天后就会倒闭 一样。这就是黄仁勋之所以成为黄仁勋的原因。” 而从马斯克身上，斯里尼瓦斯学到的是，工作不能只由金钱驱动。“如果你看他在 SpaceX 的薪酬方案，会发现薪酬结构围绕着一个目标设计：在火星上建立 拥有 100 万人口的殖民地 。让一个人拥有 10 万亿美元之类的净资产…
items.summary_en: Perplexity CEO Aravind Srinivas shared two key lessons from Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang and Tesla CEO Elon Musk: stay paranoid and be mission-driven. He noted that Huang runs Nvidia as if it might fail in 30 days, while Musk's compensation at SpaceX is tied to colonizing Mars.
items.why_zh: 揭示了顶级科技领袖的独特管理哲学，对创业者有重要启发。
items.why_en: Reveals unique management philosophies of top tech leaders, offering valuable insights for entrepreneurs.

items.title_zh: Ubuntu Touch 24.04-2.0 Beta 发布：适配索尼 Xperia X 等手机，提升上网体验
items.title_en: Ubuntu Touch 24.04-2.0 Beta Released: Browser Upgraded to Chromium 134, Notch Support Added
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，UBports 昨日（6 月 15 日）发布公告，宣布推出 Ubuntu Touch 24.04-2.0 Beta 更新， 稳定版预估将于 2026 年 7 月 13 日发布。 本次更新基于 Ubuntu 24.04 发行版改造，重点升级 Morph Browser 浏览器底层引擎，从 Chromium 87 跃升至 Chromium 134，虽然没有追上最新版本，但相比此前版本已大幅改善网页和应用兼容性。 界面上，此前 Ubuntu Touch 长期忽略屏幕刘海区域，导致内容会被遮挡。本次更新后系统可自动避开这些区域正确显示，目前已适配 Fairphone 4、Fairphone 5 等 5 款设备。 Lomiri Shell 新增截图编辑器，截屏后可直接裁剪、旋转和调色，完成后保存或分享。如不需要可在系统设置的手势选项中关闭。 其他改进包括： 网络指示器优化有线连接支持 提升移动数据连接可靠性 关闭移动数据后仍可收发 MMS 支持 fscrypt v2 设备的用户数据加密脱离实验阶段 键盘新增格鲁吉亚语 emoji 键盘新增约 2000 个表情并支持肤色变体选择。 IT之家附上 Ubuntu Touch 24.04-2.0 Beta 更新适配机型如下： F(x)tec Pro1X Fairphone 4 Fairphone 5 Lenovo Ta…
items.summary_en: UBports released Ubuntu Touch 24.04-2.0 Beta on June 15, based on Ubuntu 24.04. The update upgrades the Morph Browser engine from Chromium 87 to 134, adds notch display support for 5 devices, and introduces a screenshot editor. Other improvements include better network indicators, MMS support when mobile data is off, and new emojis.
items.why_zh: 这是 Ubuntu Touch 在浏览器性能和界面适配上的重大升级，显著提升了用户体验和兼容性。
items.why_en: This is a major upgrade for Ubuntu Touch, significantly improving browser performance and display compatibility.

items.title_zh: “深朴智能”完成数亿元Pre-A轮融资
items.title_en: General-Purpose Embodied AI Robot Company 'Simple AI' Raises Hundreds of Millions in Pre-A Round
items.summary_zh: 36氪获悉，据深朴智能消息，近日，通用具身智能机器人公司“深朴智能”（Simple AI）宣布完成数亿元Pre-A轮融资。本轮融资由滴滴领投，梅花创投、柯力传感跟投，老股东创世伙伴创投、线性资本、普华资本持续加码。本轮融资完成后，深朴智能将进一步加速具身智能机器人在真实场景中的产品迭代与规模化商用，重点推进Simple-World Model迭代升级、具身智能数据体系建设、核心人才引进及泛家庭场景的落地布局。
items.summary_en: Simple AI, a general-purpose embodied AI robot company, completed a Pre-A round of hundreds of millions of yuan led by Didi, with participation from Plum Ventures and others. The funds will accelerate product iteration and commercial deployment, focusing on Simple-World Model upgrades, data infrastructure, talent acquisition, and home scenarios.
items.why_zh: 这是具身智能领域的重要融资，表明资本对通用机器人商业化前景的认可。
items.why_en: This significant investment in embodied AI signals strong market confidence in the commercialization of general-purpose robots.

items.title_zh: 中国 AI 行业最大单轮融资：消息称 DeepSeek 完成超 70 亿美元投资，腾讯、宁德时代、京东、网易入局但没有投票权
items.title_en: DeepSeek Raises Over $7 Billion; Tencent, CATL Invest Without Voting Rights
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，据外媒 The Information 今日报道，两位知情人士透露，DeepSeek 以非寻常的交易结构，完成创纪录的 超 70 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 474.03 亿元人民币）融资 ，估值超过 500 亿美元（现汇率约合 3385.95 亿元人民币）。这是中国 AI 行业迄今规模最大的单轮融资。 报道称，此轮融资采用了一种不寻常的结构， 赋予投资者经济权益，但没有投票权 。投资者还将面临五年的锁定期， 并且预计不会获得董事会席位 。 知情人士称， 唯一例外是国家人工智能产业投资基金 ，该基金直接注资 DeepSeek，不受股权锁定期约束，并享有公司投票权，本次出资 10 亿元人民币。 报道提到， 腾讯控股、宁德时代、京东、网易和 IDG 资本 参与了此轮融资。 DeepSeek 凭借 V3 大模型与 R1 推理模型收获广泛好评，打破外界对中国人工智能技术实力的固有认知，一跃成为国内头部 AI 标杆企业，在全球打响知名度。 路透社知情人士曾表示 ，DeepSeek 创始人梁文峰将自掏腰包出资 200 亿元；科技巨头腾讯拟投资 100 亿元，动力电池龙头宁德时代计划出资 50 亿元，这两家公司将成为此次融资中最大的外部投资者。
items.summary_en: DeepSeek raised over $7 billion at a valuation over $50 billion, the largest AI funding round in China. Investors including Tencent and CATL have economic rights but no voting rights, with a five-year lock-up. Only the National AI Industry Fund received voting rights with a $140 million investment.
items.why_zh: 该融资创纪录且结构罕见，显示 DeepSeek 对控制权的坚持以及投资者的高度信任。
items.why_en: This record-breaking round with an unusual structure shows DeepSeek's insistence on control and strong investor trust.

items.title_en: OpenAI's Total Spending Reached $34 Billion Last Year, with R&D at $19 Billion
items.summary_zh: 据报道，OpenAI去年总支出达340亿美元，以求在计划的首次公开募股（IPO）之前抢占蓬勃发展的人工智能市场主导地位。报道称，经审计的财务数据显示，这家ChatGPT开发商2025年研发投入约190亿美元，销售及营销支出近60亿美元，此外还有其他各类开支。（新浪财经）
items.summary_en: OpenAI's total spending in 2025 reached $34 billion, including $19 billion on R&D and nearly $6 billion on sales and marketing, according to audited financial data. The heavy investment aims to dominate the AI market ahead of a planned IPO.
items.why_zh: 该数据揭示了OpenAI在IPO前的大规模投入，反映了AI行业竞争的白热化程度。
items.why_en: This data reveals OpenAI's massive pre-IPO spending, highlighting the intense competition in the AI industry.

items.title_zh: IDC：全球服务器营收 2026Q1 同比增长 30.4%，戴尔稳居第一 OEM
items.title_en: IDC: Global Server Revenue Up 30.4% YoY in Q1 2026, Dell Remains Top OEM
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，IDC 在其美国当地时间 15 日发布的新闻稿中表示，全球服务器市场在 2026 年 1 季度营业收入规模达到 1226 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 8302.36 亿元人民币），同比增长 30.4%。 图源：Pixabay 其中 Dell（戴尔）一家独占 16.5%，同比增幅达到惊人的 244.1%，牢牢占据第一大服务器 OEM 地位，与身后的 Supermicro（超微）拉开 8.9 个百分点的差距。ODM 直销模式在整体市场中的占比则从去年同期的 64.1% 下滑至 50.2%。 从指令集角度，非 x86 服务器的市占在 2026Q1 达到 47.9%，同比增幅 107.6%。而在算力类型角度，GPU 加速服务器在市场中的占比为 56.2%；其它加速服务器营收同比激增 122.1%。 而在地域维度上，加拿大实现 190.9% 同比增长，中东和非洲则有 121.4% 增幅。美国服务器市场单季营收规模 796 亿美元，同比 +24.1%；中国市场规模则扩大 30.9% 至 192 亿美元。 图源：Pexels IDC 认为 服务器市场短期内的增长瓶颈位于供应侧 ： AI 基础设施投资持续追加，但非加速服务器的出货与营收受到存储半导体等零组件供应受限的遏制。而到 2027 年，随着 CPU、DRAM、NAND、HDD 的新产能投入运行，当前的窘境…
items.summary_en: Global server revenue reached $122.6 billion in Q1 2026, up 30.4% YoY. Dell led with 16.5% share, growing 244.1%. Non-x86 servers accounted for 47.9% and GPU-accelerated servers 56.2%. Supply-side constraints limit non-accelerated server growth.
items.why_zh: 该报告反映了AI基础设施投资的强劲势头及服务器市场的结构性变化。
items.why_en: This report reflects the strong momentum of AI infrastructure investment and structural shifts in the server market.

items.title_en: Zhipu Continues to Rise Over 7%! Launches New Flagship Model GLM-5.2, Subscription Pricing Power Expected to Strengthen
items.summary_zh: 智谱续涨逾7%！公司已推出最新一代旗舰模型GLM-5.2，订阅定价能力有望加强- 老虎证券 Tiger Brokers
items.summary_en: Zhipu's stock rose over 7% after launching its latest flagship model GLM-5.2, which is expected to strengthen subscription pricing power. Investors are optimistic about its technology and business prospects.
items.why_zh: 智谱推出GLM-5.2模型，展示了其AI技术的持续进步，可能提升市场竞争力。
items.why_en: Zhipu's launch of GLM-5.2 demonstrates continuous AI advancement, potentially boosting market competitiveness.

items.title_zh: 英伟达员工考公上岸引热议，黄仁勋曾称“尽力给员工支付尽可能高的薪水”
items.title_en: Nvidia Employee Passes Civil Service Exam, Jensen Huang Once Said He Pays as High as Possible
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，根据“合肥先锋”公众号 6 月 14 日发布的《 合肥市 2026 年度考试录用公务员拟录用人员名单公示（三） 》， 一位曾在英伟达半导体科技（上海）有限公司工作的男性“考公上岸”，入选拟录用人员名单 。 这一消息被发现后，引发了网络热议。多个财经、科技类大 V 账号转发并评论，“ 英伟达再牛，终点还是上岸 ”成为热门话题。网友感慨：“果然男人一过 35，不是财务自由，就是上岸。” 英伟达作为全球 AI 芯片龙头企业，近年来业绩爆发式增长，2027 财年第一财季（2026 年 1 月 26 日～2026 年 4 月 26 日）营业总收入 816.15 亿美元（IT之家注：现汇率约合 5526.89 亿元人民币），同比增长 85%；归母净利润 583.21 亿美元（现汇率约合 3949.45 亿元人民币），同比增长 211%。 英伟达 CEO 黄仁勋也曾表示 ，公司“应该尽可能多地奖励员工”。“我确实尽力给员工支付尽可能高的薪水，”他说。“但这并不一定意味着我的方法就是正确的。”
items.summary_en: A former Nvidia employee in Shanghai was listed in Hefei's civil service recruitment, sparking online discussion. Nvidia reported Q1 FY2027 revenue of $81.6 billion, up 85% YoY. CEO Jensen Huang once said he pays employees as high as possible.
items.why_zh: 该事件反映了AI行业高薪与公务员稳定之间的职业选择矛盾。
items.why_en: This incident highlights the career choice dilemma between high AI industry salaries and stable government jobs.

items.title_zh: “全球大模型第一股”智谱再度大涨超10%，市值突破7000亿港元！ A股如何借道布局？
items.title_en: Zhipu Surges Over 10%, Market Cap Exceeds HK$700 Billion
items.summary_zh: “全球大模型第一股”智谱再度大涨超10%，市值突破7000亿港元！ A股如何借道布局？ 新浪财经
items.summary_en: Zhipu, known as the 'first global large model stock,' surged over 10%, pushing its market cap above HK$700 billion. The rally reflects investor confidence in Chinese AI model companies.
items.why_zh: 智谱的市值突破显示市场对国产大模型的高度认可。
items.why_en: Zhipu's market cap milestone shows strong market recognition of domestic large language models.

items.title_zh: 谷歌更新安卓开发最佳 AI 模型榜单：Gemini 3.5 Flash 成本最贵，约为 DeepSeek V4 Flash 的 17.5 倍
items.title_en: Google Updates Android Dev AI Model Rankings: Gemini 3.5 Flash Costs 17.5x More Than DeepSeek V4 Flash
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，谷歌昨日（6 月 15 日）更新其 Android Bench 榜单， 自家 Gemini 3.5 Flash 模型成绩明显低于外界预期。 IT之家注：Android Bench 是谷歌官方推出的安卓开发任务基准测试，用来评估不同 AI 模型在代码编写、问题解决与开发辅助方面的实际能力。 该测试更贴近真实开发场景，专门衡量 AI 模型完成安卓开发任务的能力， 因此对开发者选择模型有较强参考价值。 根据谷歌官方更新的 Android Bench 榜单，OpenAI 的 GPT-5.5 模型以 74 得分位居榜首，GPT-5.4 模型以 72.4 得分位居第二。 谷歌自家的 Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview 以 72.4 得分位居第三；而 Claude Opus 4.7（68.7 分）和 Opus 4.6（66.6 分）位居第四和第五。 其中让 Android Authority 等媒体感到惊讶的是，谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Flash 只拿到 63.7 分，最终排在第 6，未进入前 5。 在平均 Token 消耗量（每次基准测试包括 100 个任务，执行 10 次计算平均消耗）方面，谷歌 Gemini 3.5 Flash 平均消耗 3.559 亿 Tokens ，折合单次运行平均成本 147.1 美元（现汇率约合 996.1 元人民币），…
items.summary_en: Google updated its Android Bench rankings: GPT-5.5 leads with 74 points, while Gemini 3.5 Flash scored 63.7 (6th) but costs $147.1 per run, about 17.5x more than DeepSeek V4 Flash, raising cost-efficiency concerns.
items.why_zh: 该榜单揭示了不同AI模型在安卓开发中的性能与成本差异，对开发者选型有重要参考价值。
items.why_en: The rankings reveal performance and cost differences among AI models for Android development, offering key insights for developer choices.

items.title_zh: 阿里巴巴发布首个具身智能大模型 Qwen-Robot 系列，为机器人打造手、脚、大脑通用底座
items.title_en: Alibaba Releases First Embodied AI Model Series Qwen-Robot
items.summary_zh: IT之家 6 月 16 日消息，阿里巴巴发布千问具身智能大模型 Qwen-Robot 系列，包含 VLA 操作模型 Qwen-RobotManip、VLN 移动模型 Qwen-RobotNav 和世界模型 Qwen-RobotWorld 三大模型。 这是千问大模型家族首个完整的具身智能模型系列 —— 三个模型分别为机器人装上灵巧的手、认路的脚和会思考的大脑，既可单独部署，也能协同运转，让不同形态的机器人迈向真实落地有了可靠的“通用底座”。 Qwen-RobotNav ： 物理智能体的行动入口 — 通过可控观测编码和工具接口，把视觉语言能力接入移动控制，统一了指令跟随、点 / 目标导航、目标追踪和自动驾驶四类任务 Qwen-RobotManip ： 物理智能体的交互基石 — 通过规范状态-动作空间和相机坐标系下的末端执行器增量位姿，把视觉语言能力接入操作控制，基于完全由开源数据构建的 >38,100 小时语料库实现了大规模多机型训练 Qwen-RobotWorld ： 物理智能体的无限世界 — 通过自然语言动作接口，把视觉语言能力接入世界动态预测，让同一个世界模型能够跨操作、驾驶和导航场景预测符合物理规律的未来。 IT之家注意到，5 月 20 日，阿里巴巴发布全新一代千问旗舰模型 Qwen3.7-Max，在三方机构 Arena 全球大模型盲测总榜中，Qwen3.7-Max 超过 Ki…
items.summary_en: Alibaba launched the Qwen-Robot series, including manipulation (Qwen-RobotManip), navigation (Qwen-RobotNav), and world model (Qwen-RobotWorld). They provide a universal foundation for robots with dexterous manipulation, autonomous navigation, and world prediction, trained on over 38,100 hours of open-source data.
items.why_zh: 该系列是千问大模型首个完整具身智能模型，标志着阿里巴巴在机器人AI领域的重要布局。
items.why_en: This series is Alibaba's first complete embodied AI model family, marking a significant step in robotics AI.

items.title_zh: UrbanWell：评估多模态大模型的城市福祉时空分析能力
items.title_en: UrbanWell: Benchmarking Multimodal Large Language Models for Spatio-Temporal Urban Wellbeing Analytics
items.summary_zh: arXiv论文提出UrbanWell基准，用于系统评估多模态大模型在时空推理方面的能力，特别是通过卫星和街景图像联合建模城市福祉。该基准涵盖38个城市多年数据，包括环境条件（如CO₂）等指标，旨在测试模型整合异构时空信号的能力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15890v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding urban wellbeing from multimodal data requires integrating heterogeneous spatial and temporal signals, posing significant challenges for current multimodal large language models (MLLMs). We introduce UrbanWell, a large-scale benchmark designed to systematically evaluate the spatio-temporal reasoning capabilities of MLLMs for urban wellbeing analytics through joint modeling of satellite and street view imagery. UrbanWell spans 38 cities across multiple years and includes diverse indicators covering (1) environmental conditions (CO$_2$…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了多模态大模型在城市福祉时空分析评估方面的空白。
items.why_en: This benchmark fills a gap in evaluating multimodal LLMs for spatio-temporal urban wellbeing analytics.

items.title_zh: SAM中的纹理证据存在于何处？特征、提议掩码与纹理分割
items.title_en: Where Does Texture Evidence Live in SAM? Features, Proposal Masks, and Texture Segmentation
items.summary_zh: 纹理分割对基础分割模型构成挑战，因为有意义区域由材质或重复外观而非物体身份定义。Segment Anything Models (SAMs) 在默认情况下往往无法正确分割纹理定义的区域，但这种失败的原因尚不明确：纹理证据可能缺失、不在提议掩码库中，或者存在但被以物体为中心的读取方式错误选择或组合。本文研究了冻结的SAM在适应前是否已经保留了纹理相关的证据，并探索了两种冻结证据空间。该工作有助于理解SAM的内部表征，并为改进纹理分割提供方向。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14755v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Texture segmentation stresses foundation segmentation because meaningful regions are defined by material or repeated appearance rather than object identity. Segment Anything Models (SAMs) often fail by default on such texture-defined partitions, but this failure is ambiguous: the texture evidence may be absent, missing from the proposal bank, or present but selected or assembled incorrectly by an object-centric readout. We ask what texture-relevant evidence is already preserved in frozen SAM before adaptation. We study two frozen evidence space…
items.why_zh: 揭示了SAM在纹理分割任务中的失败原因，为改进基础模型的纹理感知能力提供关键见解。
items.why_en: Reveals why SAM fails on texture segmentation, offering insights for improving texture perception in foundation models.

items.title_zh: 利用皮层几何、连接和功能作为循环神经网络的归纳偏置
items.title_en: Harnessing cortical geometry, wiring, and function as inductive biases for recurrent neural networks
items.summary_zh: 皮层如何通过其连接和功能组织塑造循环计算，是神经科学和机器学习领域的核心问题。本文利用MICrONS项目的数据——涵盖小鼠视觉皮层多个区域的功能连接组学资源，其中密集钙成像与高分辨率电子显微镜重建共同注册——构建了生物学基础的循环神经网络。通过使用神经元空间共定位等信息，该研究将皮层几何和连接作为归纳偏置引入网络，旨在提升循环神经网络的计算效率和对生物神经网络的模拟真实性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14975v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: How the wiring and functional organization of cortex shape recurrent computation remains a central question in both neuroscience and machine learning. Here, we leverage data released through the Machine Intelligence from Cortical Networks (MICrONS) program--a functional connectomics resource spanning multiple areas of mouse visual cortex, in which dense calcium imaging is co-registered with high-resolution electron microscopy reconstruction from the same animal--to build biologically grounded recurrent neural networks. Using neuronal spatial co…
items.why_zh: 将真实的皮层结构和功能数据融入循环神经网络设计，有望推动更高效、更类脑的AI模型发展。
items.why_en: Integrating real cortical structure and function into RNN design may lead to more efficient and brain-like AI models.

items.title_zh: FreeSonic：无需训练的时序感知解耦注意力实现精确音频编辑
items.title_en: FreeSonic: Training-Free Temporal-Aware Decoupled Attention for Precise Audio Editing
items.summary_zh: 文本到音频生成取得了显著进展，但实现精确且一致的音频编辑仍是重大挑战。现有方法难以平衡时序一致性与背景保留。本文提出FreeSonic，一种无需训练的框架，利用基于Rectified Flow的最先进TangoFlux模型。FreeSonic采用优化的反转-逆过程以及联合文本-音频注意力图，实现精确的目标片段提取。在内容编辑方面，引入了一种新颖的调度注意力机制，以保持编辑区域的时序一致性并保护背景。实验表明，FreeSonic在多种音频编辑任务上达到了领先性能。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15186v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Text-to-audio (TTA) generation has made significant strides, yet achieving precise and consistent audio editing remains a major challenge. However, existing methods struggle to balance temporal consistency with background preservation. In this paper, we propose FreeSonic, a training-free framework leveraging the state-of-the-art Rectified Flow-based TangoFlux model. FreeSonic utilizes an optimized inversion-reverse process and joint text-audio attention maps for precise target segment extraction. For content editing, a novel scheduled attention…
items.why_zh: 无需额外训练即可实现高质量音频编辑，为音频内容创作和后期处理提供了高效工具。
items.why_en: Enables high-quality audio editing without extra training, offering an efficient tool for audio content creation and post-processing.

items.title_zh: CIWI-CKT：混沌信息波干涉特征融合与跨城市知识迁移的交通流预测
items.title_en: CIWI-CKT: Chaos-Informed Wave Interference Feature Fusion and Cross-City Knowledge Transfer for Traffic Flow Forecasting
items.summary_zh: 在跨城市、数据稀缺的场景下，准确的交通流预测仍然具有挑战性，因为有限的历史数据阻碍了模型泛化。交通动态的混沌特性、复杂的时空依赖关系以及异构的城市网络使得跨城市少样本学习变得困难。现有深度学习方法要么将交通视为完全确定性，要么缺乏建模波状干涉模式的机制，而这些模式对于跨状态交通动态至关重要。本文提出CIWI-CKT，一种融合混沌信息波干涉特征和跨城市知识迁移的框架，旨在通过引入混沌理论和波干涉特征来提升少样本场景下的预测精度。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15642v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Accurate traffic flow prediction remains challenging in cross-city, data-scarce scenarios where limited historical data hinders model generalisation. The chaotic nature of traffic dynamics, complex spatio-temporal dependencies, and heterogeneous urban networks complicate few-shot learning across cities. Existing deep learning approaches either treat traffic as purely deterministic or lack mechanisms to model wave-like interference patterns essential for cross-regime traffic dynamics. To address these limitations, this paper proposes CIWI-CKT, a…
items.why_zh: 为数据稀缺的跨城市交通预测提供了新思路，有望提升智慧城市交通管理的泛化能力。
items.why_en: Offers a novel approach for cross-city traffic prediction under data scarcity, potentially improving generalization in smart city traffic management.

items.title_zh: 控制平面布局塑造遗忘：13种系统配置下Agent记忆的架构研究
items.title_en: Control-Plane Placement Shapes Forgetting: An Architectural Study of Agent Memory Across Thirteen System Configurations
items.summary_zh: LLM在Agent记忆流水线中的位置——介于召回平面（检索存储事实，已被广泛基准测试）和控制平面（通过替换、释放、清除来改变事实，基本未经测试）之间——决定了系统能够恢复哪些遗忘失败模式。通过比较13种系统配置在385个对抗性案例上的表现，观察到三种放置机制具有部分互补的覆盖范围：确定性原语足以处理词汇/时间类别，但在规范化方面失败（标识符混淆上5%，其他类别0%）。该研究揭示了控制平面布局对Agent记忆遗忘行为的关键影响。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15903v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Where an LLM sits in an agent memory pipeline -- between the recall plane that retrieves stored facts (extensively benchmarked) and the control plane that mutates them via supersede, release, purge (largely untested) -- shapes which forgetting failure modes the system recovers. Comparing thirteen system configurations on a 385-case adversarial surface, we observe three placement regimes with partly complementary coverage: deterministic primitives suffice for lexical/temporal categories but fail canonicalization (5% on identifier-obfuscation, 0%…
items.why_zh: 首次系统研究控制平面布局对Agent记忆遗忘的影响，为设计更鲁棒的AI Agent记忆系统提供指导。
items.why_en: First systematic study of how control-plane placement affects forgetting in agent memory, guiding the design of more robust AI agent memory systems.

items.title_zh: AuAu：审计大语言模型威权倾向的基准
items.title_en: AuAu: A Benchmark for Auditing Authoritarian Alignment in Large Language Models
items.summary_zh: 全球威权主义浪潮的兴起，加上LLM在用户日常生活中的核心作用日益增强，引发了关于特定模型在多大程度上表现或促进威权态度和特征的问题。本文引入AuAu，一个全面的基准测试，旨在评估LLM生成具有威权倾向响应的风险。该基准结合了三种评估方法：(i) 来自15个人类验证工具的心理测量问题；(ii) 情境行为小故事，探测预期行为；(iii) 其他评估维度。AuAu为检测和缓解LLM中的威权倾向提供了重要工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.16127v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: The worldwide surge of authoritarianism, combined with the increasing central role in users' everyday lives, raises the question of to what extent specific models exhibit or promote authoritarian attitudes and characteristics. We introduce AuAu, a comprehensive benchmark that aims to assess the risk of LLMs generating responses with authoritarian tendencies. This benchmark combines three evaluation approaches: (i) psychometric questions from an extensive pool of 15 human validated instruments; (ii) contextual behavior vignettes probing intended…
items.why_zh: 首个系统审计LLM威权倾向的基准，对确保AI系统符合民主价值观具有重要意义。
items.why_en: First systematic benchmark for auditing authoritarian tendencies in LLMs, crucial for ensuring AI systems align with democratic values.

items.title_zh: 通过噪声放大揭示伪影：AI生成视频检测的新视角
items.title_en: Revealing Artifacts via Noise Amplification: A Novel Perspective for AI-Generated Video Detection
items.summary_zh: 随着视频生成模型的快速发展，区分AI生成视频与真实视频成为一项挑战。现有研究大多集中于开发检测生成对抗网络样本的检测器，但检测AI生成视频，尤其是文本到视频模型生成的视频，仍是一个未探索的领域。尽管最先进的文本到视频模型可以生成类似真实视频的视觉内容，但它们仍会留下细微伪影。本文提出通过噪声放大来揭示这些伪影，为AI生成视频检测提供了新视角。该方法利用AI生成视频在噪声放大后表现出的独特模式，实现高效检测。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.16742v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: With the rapid advancement of video generation models, distinguishing between AI-generated and authentic videos has emerged as a challenging endeavor. The majority of existing research endeavors concentrate on the development of detectors for identifying samples generated by generative adversarial networks. Nevertheless, the detection of AI-generated videos, particularly those produced by text-to-video models, still remains an uncharted territory. Although state-of-the-art text-to-video models can generate realistic visual content similar to re…
items.why_zh: 提出了一种创新的AI视频检测方法，有助于应对深度伪造视频带来的安全挑战。
items.why_en: Proposes an innovative detection method for AI-generated videos, helping address security challenges from deepfake videos.

items.title_zh: TuneJury：改进音乐生成偏好对齐的开放指标
items.title_en: TuneJury: An Open Metric for Improving Music Generation Preference Alignment
items.summary_zh: 本文介绍TuneJury，一个开放的、实例级别的文本到音乐成对奖励模型，能够根据文本提示和音频片段预测音乐偏好分数。发布的检查点基于公开的人类偏好标签训练，涵盖竞技场风格投票、度量对齐偏好对、众包成对比较和专家审美评分。两个片段之间的预测分数差在保留测试集上校准良好，支持通过简单分数阈值进行数据过滤。TuneJury在多个音乐生成任务上展现出良好的泛化能力，为改进音乐生成模型的偏好对齐提供了有效指标。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17006v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce TuneJury, an open, instance-level pairwise reward model for text-to-music that predicts a music preference score from a text prompt and an audio clip. The released checkpoint is trained on publicly available human-preference labels covering arena-style (A vs. B) votes, metric-alignment preference pairs, crowdsourced pairwise comparisons, and expert aesthetic ratings. The predicted score margin between two clips is well calibrated on our held-out test split, supporting data filtering via a simple score threshold. TuneJury generalize…
items.why_zh: 为音乐生成提供了开放的偏好对齐指标，有助于提升生成音乐的质量和用户满意度。
items.why_en: Provides an open preference alignment metric for music generation, helping improve generated music quality and user satisfaction.

items.title_zh: HAMON：用于长期预测的无源光学序列混合
items.title_en: HAMON: Passive Optical Sequence Mixing for Long-Horizon Forecasting
items.summary_zh: 一项新研究提出HAMON，一种无源衍射光学预测协处理器，用于长期时间序列预测。研究表明，简单的线性和频域模型在长期预测中仍具竞争力，而Transformer的密集叠加表示可能并非必需。HAMON利用光学计算实现低复杂度、近似线性的预测操作，有望在能效和速度上超越传统数字方法。该工作挑战了深度学习在时间序列预测中的主导地位，为光学计算在AI中的应用开辟了新路径。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.17028v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Simple linear and frequency-domain models remain surprisingly competitive in long-horizon time-series forecasting, and recent mechanistic evidence suggests that standard forecasting benchmarks may not require the dense superposed representations that make transformers powerful in other domains. This raises a substrate-level question: if the core forecasting operator is often low-complexity and approximately linear, does it need to be implemented as learned digital temporal mixing? We introduce HAMON, a passive diffractive optical forecasting co…
items.why_zh: 该研究挑战了深度学习在时间序列预测中的必要性，展示了光学计算作为高效替代方案的潜力。
items.why_en: This work challenges the necessity of deep learning for time-series forecasting and demonstrates the potential of optical computing as an efficient alternative.

items.title_zh: LLM-WikiRace基准：LLM在真实知识图谱中的规划能力评估
items.title_en: LLM-WikiRace Benchmark: How Far Can LLMs Plan over Real-World Knowledge Graphs?
items.summary_zh: 研究人员推出LLM-WikiRace基准，用于评估大语言模型（LLM）在真实知识图谱中的规划、推理和世界知识能力。模型需通过维基百科超链接逐步从源页面导航至目标页面，考验前瞻性规划和概念关联推理。评估涵盖Gemini-3、GPT-5、Claude Opus 4.5等模型，在简单级别上表现最强。该基准揭示了LLM在复杂规划任务中的局限性，为提升模型推理能力提供了新测试平台。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2602.16902v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We introduce LLM-Wikirace, a benchmark for evaluating planning, reasoning, and world knowledge in large language models (LLMs). In LLM-Wikirace, models must efficiently navigate Wikipedia hyperlinks step by step to reach a target page from a given source, requiring look-ahead planning and the ability to reason about how concepts are connected in the real world. We evaluate a broad set of open- and closed-source models, including Gemini-3, GPT-5, and Claude Opus 4.5, which achieve the strongest results on the easy level of the task and demonst…
items.why_zh: 该基准为评估LLM的规划与推理能力提供了新方法，揭示了当前模型在复杂知识导航中的不足。
items.why_en: This benchmark provides a new method to evaluate LLM planning and reasoning, revealing current models' shortcomings in complex knowledge navigation.

items.title_zh: 何时需要LLM？语言驱动型多臂老虎机的诊断方法
items.title_en: When Do We Need LLMs? A Diagnostic for Language-Driven Bandits
items.summary_zh: 研究针对包含文本和数值信息的上下文多臂老虎机问题，提出LLMP-UCB算法。该算法仅在必要时调用大语言模型进行推理，从而降低计算成本。在推荐系统、动态投资组合调整等金融场景中，LLM的频繁使用代价高昂且不确定性估计困难。LLMP-UCB通过诊断机制决定何时需要LLM，平衡了性能与效率。实验表明，该方法在保持决策质量的同时显著减少了LLM调用次数。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.05859v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We study Contextual Multi-Armed Bandits (CMABs) for non-episodic decision-making problems where the context includes both textual and numerical information (e.g., recommendation systems, dynamic portfolio adjustments, offer selection; all frequent problems in finance). While Large Language Models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to these settings, utilizing LLMs for reasoning at every decision step is computationally expensive, and uncertainty estimates are difficult to obtain. To address this, we introduce LLMP-UCB, a bandit algorithm that de…
items.why_zh: 该研究解决了LLM在决策问题中计算成本高的问题，提出了按需使用LLM的高效策略。
items.why_en: This work addresses the high computational cost of LLMs in decision-making by proposing an on-demand usage strategy.

items.title_zh: 虚拟言语治疗师：临床医生参与的AI言语治疗智能体
items.title_en: Virtual Speech Therapist: A Clinician-in-the-Loop AI Speech Therapy Agent for Personalized and Supervised Therapy
items.summary_zh: 论文开发了虚拟言语治疗师（VST），一个基于智能体的平台，用于口吃评估和个性化治疗规划。VST集成深度学习口吃分类和多智能体大语言模型推理，支持循证临床决策。系统从患者语音样本采集和特征提取开始，进行口吃类型分类，并基于结果生成定制治疗方案。临床医生可监督和调整AI建议，确保治疗的安全性和有效性。该平台有望提高言语治疗的普及性和个性化水平。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.01101v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: This paper develops Virtual Speech Therapist (VST), an intelligent agent-based platform that streamlines stuttering assessment and delivers customized therapy planning through automated and adaptive AI-driven workflows. VST integrates state-of-the-art deep learning-based stuttering classification, and multi-agent large language model (LLM) reasoning to support evidence-based clinical decision-making. The VST begins with the acquisition and feature extraction of patient speech samples, followed by robust classification of stuttering types. Bui…
items.why_zh: 该平台将AI与临床监督结合，有望提升言语治疗的可及性和个性化程度。
items.why_en: This platform combines AI with clinical oversight, potentially improving accessibility and personalization of speech therapy.

items.title_zh: 模型原生计算架构：通过计算机架构视角展望未来系统架构
items.title_en: Model-Native Computing Architecture: Envisioning Future System Architecture Through the Lens of Computer Architecture
items.summary_zh: 论文提出模型原生计算架构，将大语言模型类比为CPU，KV缓存为处理器缓存，上下文窗口为主存，智能体框架为操作系统。通过借鉴计算机架构数十年的经验，指导下一代模型原生系统的设计。研究探讨了缓存复用、上下文容量、智能体调度和权限控制等工程挑战，并映射到经典计算机系统问题。该视角为LLM系统设计提供了系统化的理论框架，有望推动AI基础设施的演进。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00288v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Large language models are undergoing a transition from model technology to system technology. Engineering challenges like cache reuse, context capacity, agent scheduling, and permission control resemble classical computer systems problems. This raises a question: if we treat the LLM as a CPU, KV cache as processor cache, context window as main memory, and agent framework as an operating system, can decades of computer architecture wisdom guide next generation model native systems? This paper pursues this analogy as a visionary survey. We map…
items.why_zh: 该研究为LLM系统设计提供了系统化的计算机架构视角，有助于推动AI基础设施的演进。
items.why_en: This work provides a systematic computer architecture perspective for LLM system design, potentially advancing AI infrastructure.

items.title_zh: 投影与量化：从随机投影到RAG时代的哈希学习统一视角
items.title_en: Projection and Quantisation: A Unifying View of Learning to Hash, from Random Projections to the RAG Era
items.summary_zh: 论文提出投影-量化-组织视角，统一了近似最近邻搜索中的各种方法。该视角认为所有方法都涉及三个设计选择：投影位置、量化阈值和搜索代码组织。研究通过可复现的BitBudget基准测试验证了这一视角，并报告了三个发现。该工作旨在连接不同社区的研究，促进检索增强生成（RAG）等领域的进展。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2510.04127v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Approximate nearest-neighbour search underpins large-scale retrieval and retrieval-augmented generation, yet its methods are studied in communities that seldom read one another. We argue that they form one field with three design choices. We develop the projection-quantisation-organisation lens: every method places its projections, places its quantisation thresholds, and organises the resulting codes for search. We test the lens with a reproducible measurement, released as the open BitBudget benchmark, and report three findings. First,…
items.why_zh: 该研究为近似最近邻搜索提供了统一视角，有助于促进检索增强生成等领域的发展。
items.why_en: This work provides a unifying view for approximate nearest-neighbor search, potentially advancing retrieval-augmented generation.

items.title_zh: 神经启发的多模态视觉语言模型能否抵御成员推断隐私泄露？
items.title_en: Are Neuro-Inspired Multi-Modal Vision-Language Models Resilient to Membership Inference Privacy Leakage?
items.summary_zh: 研究调查了多模态视觉语言模型（VLM）在成员推断攻击下的隐私泄露风险。尽管生物启发模型在单模态系统中表现出鲁棒性，但多模态模型可能面临新的攻击向量。论文在黑盒设置下分析了VLM的隐私漏洞，发现神经启发的多模态模型并非天然免疫。该工作强调了在部署多模态AI时需考虑隐私保护，并呼吁开发更安全的模型架构。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2511.20710v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: In the age of agentic AI, the growing deployment of multi-modal models (MMs) has introduced new attack vectors that can leak sensitive training data in MMs, causing privacy leakage. This paper investigates a black-box privacy attack, i.e., membership inference attack (MIA) on multi-modal vision-language models (VLMs). State-of-the-art research analyzes privacy attacks primarily to unimodal AI-ML systems, while recent studies indicate MMs can also be vulnerable to privacy attacks. While researchers have demonstrated that biologically ins…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了多模态AI模型在隐私保护方面的脆弱性，对安全部署具有重要警示意义。
items.why_en: This study reveals privacy vulnerabilities in multi-modal AI models, providing important warnings for secure deployment.

items.title_zh: 基于无监督深度学习的苏丹冲突相关火灾近实时检测
items.title_en: Near--Real-Time Conflict-Related Fire Detection in Sudan Using Unsupervised Deep Learning
items.summary_zh: 研究利用无监督深度学习实现苏丹冲突相关火灾的近实时检测。方法基于轻量级变分自编码器（VAE）模型，结合3米分辨率的Planet Labs四波段卫星影像。系统可在24至36小时内检测到受火灾影响的区域，为冲突监测提供及时信息。该工作展示了深度学习在高频卫星图像分析中的应用潜力，有助于人道主义响应和灾害评估。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2512.07925v4 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Ongoing armed conflict in Sudan highlights the need for rapid monitoring of conflict-related fire-affected areas. Recent advances in deep learning and high-frequency satellite imagery enable near--real-time assessment of active fires and burn scars in war zones. This study presents a near--real-time monitoring approach using a lightweight Variational Auto-Encoder (VAE)--based model integrated with 4-band Planet Labs imagery at 3 m spatial resolution. We demonstrate that these impacted regions can be detected within approximately 24 to 3…
items.why_zh: 该研究为冲突地区的火灾监测提供了快速、自动化的方法，对人道主义救援具有重要意义。
items.why_en: This work provides a rapid, automated method for fire monitoring in conflict zones, crucial for humanitarian response.

items.title_zh: 基于特征分析与图卷积神经网络的脑电信号癫痫发作检测
items.title_en: Epileptic Seizure Detection in Separate Frequency Bands Using Feature Analysis and Graph Convolutional Neural Network (GCN) from Electroencephalogram (EEG) Signals
items.summary_zh: 癫痫发作是由大脑异常过度电活动引起的神经系统疾病，脑电图（EEG）信号因其捕捉时空神经动态的能力而被广泛用于癫痫诊断。尽管最近的深度学习方法取得了高检测精度，但它们往往缺乏可解释性和神经生理学相关性。本研究提出了一种基于频率感知的癫痫发作检测框架，利用特征分析和图卷积神经网络（GCN）从EEG信号中检测发作期活动。该框架通过分离不同频带进行分析，旨在提高检测的可解释性，同时保持高准确性。这一方法有望为临床癫痫诊断提供更可靠的辅助工具。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.00163v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Epileptic seizures are neurological disorders characterized by abnormal and excessive electrical activity in the brain, resulting in recurrent seizure events. Electroencephalogram (EEG) signals are widely used for seizure diagnosis due to their ability to capture temporal and spatial neural dynamics. While recent deep learning methods have achieved high detection accuracy, they often lack interpretability and neurophysiological relevance. This study presents a frequency-aware framework for epileptic seizure detection based on ictal-phas…
items.why_zh: 该研究通过结合频率分析和GCN，提升了癫痫检测的可解释性，有助于临床诊断。
items.why_en: This work enhances interpretability in seizure detection, aiding clinical diagnosis.

items.title_zh: 超越判例法：评估法规中心法律问答中的结构感知检索与安全性
items.title_en: Beyond Case Law: Evaluating Structure-Aware Retrieval and Safety in Statute-Centric Legal QA
items.summary_zh: 法律问答基准主要关注判例法，忽视了法规中心推理的独特挑战。在法规领域，相关证据分布在层级关联的文档中，导致传统检索器失效，模型在不完整上下文中容易产生幻觉。为此，研究者引入了SearchFireSafety，一个面向法规中心法律问答的结构与安全感知基准。该基准以消防安全法规为例，评估模型在结构化检索和安全性方面的表现。这一工作填补了法规问答领域的空白，有助于提升法律AI的可靠性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.06173v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Legal QA benchmarks have predominantly focused on case law, overlooking the unique challenges of statute-centric regulatory reasoning. In statutory domains, relevant evidence is distributed across hierarchically linked documents, creating a statutory retrieval gap where conventional retrievers fail and models often hallucinate under incomplete context. We introduce SearchFireSafety, a structure- and safety-aware benchmark for statute-centric legal QA. Instantiated on fire-safety regulations as a representative case, the benchmark evalua…
items.why_zh: 该基准填补了法规中心法律问答的空白，提升了法律AI的结构化检索与安全性。
items.why_en: This benchmark addresses the unique challenges of statute-centric legal QA, improving retrieval and safety.

items.title_zh: OmniMouse：基于1500亿神经令牌的多模态多任务脑模型扩展特性
items.title_en: OmniMouse: Scaling properties of multi-modal, multi-task Brain Models on 150B Neural Tokens
items.summary_zh: 数据与人工神经网络的扩展已推动AI在语言和视觉领域的突破，但类似原则是否适用于脑活动建模仍不清楚。本研究利用来自73只小鼠视觉皮层310万个神经元的数据集，总计超过1500亿神经令牌，记录于自然电影、图像、参数刺激和行为期间。研究者训练了多模态多任务模型，支持神经预测、行为解码和刺激重建三种灵活模式。实验揭示了脑模型扩展的规律，为神经科学中的大规模建模提供了新见解。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2604.18827v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Scaling data and artificial neural networks has transformed AI, driving breakthroughs in language and vision. Whether similar principles apply to modeling brain activity remains unclear. Here we leveraged a dataset of 3.1 million neurons from the visual cortex of 73 mice across 323 sessions, totaling more than 150 billion neural tokens recorded during natural movies, images and parametric stimuli, and behavior. We train multi-modal, multi-task models that support three regimes flexibly at test time: neural prediction, behavioral decodin…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了脑模型扩展的规律，为神经科学大规模建模提供了重要参考。
items.why_en: This work reveals scaling properties in brain modeling, advancing neuroscience AI.

items.title_zh: 下一代LLM智能体系统中合作的演化动力学：跨提供商的实证扩展
items.title_en: Evolutionary Dynamics of Cooperation in Next-Generation LLM Agent Systems: A Cross-Provider Empirical Extension
items.summary_zh: 下一代LLM智能体是否继承了前代的合作偏见？规模与提供商多样性如何重塑竞争多智能体环境中的均衡行为？Willis等人通过演化博弈论和迭代囚徒困境建立了基准，发现ChatGPT-4o和Claude 3.5 Sonnet存在一致的合作偏见。本研究将该基准扩展到2025-2026年发布的四个前沿模型：Claude Sonnet 4.6、Gemini 2.5 Flash、Gemini 3.1 Pro和GPT-5.4。结果显示，不同模型在合作倾向和策略稳定性上存在差异，为理解LLM智能体的社会行为提供了新视角。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2605.29874v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Do next-generation LLM agents inherit the cooperative biases documented in their predecessors, or does scale and provider diversity reshape equilibrium behaviour in competitive multi-agent settings? Willis et al. established a benchmark for this question using evolutionary game theory and the Iterated Prisoner's Dilemma (IPD), finding consistent cooperative biases in ChatGPT-4o and Claude 3.5 Sonnet. We extend this benchmark to four frontier models released in 2025-2026 - Claude Sonnet 4.6, Gemini 2.5 Flash, Gemini 3.1 Pro, and GPT-5.4…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了不同LLM智能体的合作差异，对多智能体系统设计有重要影响。
items.why_en: This work uncovers provider-specific cooperation biases in LLM agents, informing multi-agent system design.

items.title_zh: 先检测再跳跃：视觉语言模型中的幻象检测
items.title_en: Detect Before You Leap: Mirage Detection in Vision-Language Models
items.summary_zh: 视觉语言模型（VLM）可能在视觉证据缺失、空白或与问题无关时产生自信的视觉答案，这种失败模式被称为“幻象”，在医学和文档VQA中尤为严重。本研究关注预生成幻象检测问题：给定图像-问题对，在生成前判断VLM应回答还是弃权。研究者提出了一种检测方法，旨在识别模型何时缺乏足够的视觉证据。该工作有助于提升VLM的可靠性，防止误导性输出。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.00435v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) can produce confident visual answers even when the required visual evidence is missing, blank, or unrelated to the question. This failure mode, recently described as mirage (mirage2026), is especially concerning in medical and document VQA, where a plausible but visually ungrounded answer may be mistaken for image-based evidence. We study the complementary problem of pre-release mirage detection: given an image-question pair, determine whether the VLM should answer or abstain before generation. To that end,…
items.why_zh: 幻象检测能防止VLM在缺乏视觉证据时产生误导性答案，提升模型可靠性。
items.why_en: Mirage detection prevents VLMs from generating misleading answers without visual evidence, enhancing reliability.

items.title_zh: LIBERO-Occ：通过视角想象评估和改进场景诱导遮挡下的视觉-语言-动作模型
items.title_en: LIBERO-Occ: Evaluating and Improving Vision-Language-Action Models under Scene-Induced Occlusion via Viewpoint Imagination
items.summary_zh: 视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在标准操作基准上表现强劲，但多数评估假设任务相关物体完全可见，这在现实场景中常因遮挡而失效。本文研究场景诱导遮挡对VLA模型的挑战，并引入LIBERO-Occ，一个基于LIBERO的遮挡扩展基准。实验表明，最先进的VLA模型在遮挡下性能显著下降。研究者提出通过视角想象来缓解遮挡影响，从而提升VLA模型在部分可观测环境中的鲁棒性。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.10862v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models achieve strong performance on standard manipulation benchmarks, but most evaluations assume that task-relevant objects are fully visible. This assumption often fails in realistic settings, where occlusion makes manipulation partially observable. In this paper, we study \textit{scene-induced occlusion} as a fundamental challenge for VLA models and introduce \textbf{LIBERO-Occ}, an occlusion-oriented extension of LIBERO. Experiments show that state-of-the-art VLAs suffer substantial performance degradat…
items.why_zh: 该研究揭示了遮挡对VLA模型的严重影响，并提出了改进方法，对机器人操作至关重要。
items.why_en: This work highlights occlusion challenges in VLA models and offers a solution, critical for real-world robotics.

items.title_zh: Clay-CNN混合模型：利用地理空间基础模型作为辅助上下文进行滑坡检测
items.title_en: Clay-CNN Hybrids: Leveraging Geospatial Foundation Models as Auxiliary Context for Landslide Detection
items.summary_zh: 快速灾后滑坡测绘对灾害响应至关重要，但由于极端类别不平衡，自动化仍困难。本研究评估了地理空间基础模型Clay v1.5能否改进像素级滑坡分割。在Landslide4Sense基准上，包含3799个训练样本，正像素仅约2%。研究者比较了三种策略：Clay作为主编码器、U-Net骨干增强Clay特征、以及Clay作为辅助上下文。结果表明，将Clay作为辅助上下文能有效提升分割性能，为滑坡检测提供了新方法。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.14081v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Rapid post-event landslide mapping is essential for disaster response but remains difficult to automate due to extreme class imbalance. This study evaluates whether Clay v1.5, a Geospatial Foundation Model (GFM), can improve pixel-level landslide segmentation on the Landslide4Sense (L4S) benchmark, which contains 3,799 training chips with 14 Sentinel-2 and terrain bands and approximately 2% positive pixels. We compare three strategies: Clay as the primary encoder with multi-scale residual terrain fusion, a U-Net backbone augmented with…
items.why_zh: 该研究利用地理空间基础模型辅助滑坡检测，提升了灾害响应中的自动化能力。
items.why_en: This work leverages geospatial foundation models for landslide detection, enhancing disaster response automation.

items.title_zh: 机器学习与随机游走谜题：基于扩展窗口评估和SHAP可解释性的加元/美元汇率预测
items.title_en: Machine Learning and the Random Walk Puzzle: Forecasting the CAD/USD Exchange Rate with Expanding Window Evaluation and SHAP Interpretability
items.summary_zh: 本研究检验机器学习模型能否在预测月度美元/加元汇率时超越朴素随机游走基准。使用加拿大银行2017年1月至2026年5月的日数据，重采样为113个月度观测，评估了线性回归、随机森林、梯度提升、XGBoost和AdaBoost五种模型，并与随机游走和指数平滑（Holt-Winters）对比。所有模型采用扩展窗口评估，并利用SHAP进行可解释性分析。结果显示，部分ML模型在特定指标上优于随机游走，但整体优势有限，揭示了汇率预测的挑战。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15058v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study examines whether machine learning (ML) models can outperform the naive random walk benchmark in forecasting the monthly USD/CAD exchange rate. Using daily data from the Bank of Canada spanning January 2017 to May 2026, resampled into 113 monthly observations, five ML models are evaluated: linear regression, random forest, gradient boosting, XGBoost, and AdaBoost. These models are benchmarked against the naive random walk model and exponential smoothing with Holt-Winters seasonality (ETS). All models are evaluated using an expanding-win…
items.why_zh: 该研究验证了机器学习在汇率预测中相对于随机游走的有限优势，对金融预测有重要启示。
items.why_en: This work tests ML against random walk in exchange rate forecasting, offering insights into financial prediction limits.

items.title_zh: AI助力社会公益：伦敦环境法规对空气污染影响的因果研究
items.title_en: AI for Social Good: An Investigation of the Causal Relationship Between Environmental Regulations and Their Effects on Air Pollution in London, UK
items.summary_zh: 该研究开发了一种基于贝叶斯深度学习的不确定性感知框架，用于评估2010年至2020年间伦敦空气污染法规对PM2.5浓度的总体影响。由于政策实施的非随机性以及气象、社会经济变化、时间趋势和多重干预的叠加影响，传统方法难以准确估计法规效果。该框架整合了伦敦内城的每日PM2.5观测数据，能够量化不确定性，为城市空气质量管理提供更可靠的因果推断。研究结果有助于优化未来环境政策的制定，并展示了AI在环境治理中的潜力。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.15257v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Air pollution regulation is central to urban public health governance, but estimating its effects is difficult because policies are implemented non-randomly and pollution trajectories are shaped by meteorology, socioeconomic change, temporal trends, and overlapping interventions. This study develops an uncertainty-aware Bayesian deep learning framework to estimate the aggregate effect of air pollution regulations on PM$_{2.5}$ concentrations in London from 2010 to 2020. The framework integrates daily PM$_{2.5}$ observations from Inner London moni…
items.why_zh: 该研究展示了AI在环境政策评估中的实际应用，为城市空气污染治理提供了更精确的因果分析方法。
items.why_en: This work demonstrates AI's practical application in environmental policy evaluation, offering more precise causal analysis for urban air pollution control.

items.title_zh: 近最优随机线性赌博机：延迟反馈下的遗憾界
items.title_en: Near-Optimal Stochastic Linear Bandits with Delay
items.summary_zh: 该论文研究了多种延迟模型下的随机线性赌博机问题，并建立了近最优的遗憾界。结果表明，当延迟与损失无关时，延迟仅带来附加的遗憾惩罚，且线性结构与多臂赌博机行为相似；但在某些情况下，线性结构会带来新的挑战。研究为在线学习中的延迟反馈问题提供了理论保证，有助于改进推荐系统、广告投放等实际应用。
items.summary_en: arXiv:2606.16656v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study stochastic linear bandits with delayed feedback under several delay models and establish near-optimal regret guarantees. Our results identify when delayed linear bandits exhibit the same qualitative behavior as multi-armed bandits (MAB), and when the linear structure creates fundamentally new challenges. Specifically, (1) for \emph{loss-independent delays}, where the delay does not depend on the realized loss (but potentially depends on the arm), we show that delays incur only an additive regret penalty. Under stochastic delays, this pen…
items.why_zh: 该研究为延迟反馈下的在线学习提供了理论边界，对推荐系统和广告投放等实际场景具有重要指导意义。
items.why_en: This research provides theoretical bounds for online learning with delayed feedback, crucial for applications like recommendation systems and advertising.
